title: galarhoeus orientalis
intro: Galarhoeus orientalis, also known as Chinese milkwort, is a plant species that belongs to the family Phyllanthaceae and is native to China and Korea. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Galarhoeus orientalis include reducing inflammation, improving immune function, and exhibiting potential anti-cancer properties. In traditional Chinese medicine, the plant is often prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, and is also used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
